VisionMessage.visionText: To redefine the standard of real estate by delivering exceptional properties that inspire and endure — building communities where people truly belong.
VisionMessage.messageText: At Nexus Properties, every transaction is built on trust, transparency, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. We don't just sell properties — we craft lasting legacies.

Team.heading: The People Behind Nexus
Team.intro: Our team of dedicated professionals brings decades of combined experience across real estate, design, and client relations.

SophisticationBanner.heading: Where sophistication meets substance — every detail thoughtfully considered.
SophisticationBanner.sub: From concept to completion, Nexus Properties delivers residences that transcend the ordinary and define a new standard of living.

About.heading: Built on Integrity, Driven by Excellence
About.body: Since our founding, Nexus Properties has been committed to delivering premium real estate solutions across Austin and beyond. Our approach combines market expertise with a deep respect for our clients' vision.
About.experienceLine: Over 15 Years of Real Estate Excellence

Services.heading: Comprehensive Real Estate Solutions
Services.sub: From residential sales to commercial investments, we offer a full spectrum of services tailored to your unique needs.
Services.card1Tagline: Expert guidance for buying and selling premium homes across Austin's most sought-after neighborhoods.
Services.card2Tagline: Strategic insights to maximize your real estate portfolio and identify high-value opportunities.
Services.card3Tagline: Full-service commercial real estate solutions for businesses of every size and ambition.
Services.card4Tagline: Seamless transitions for individuals and families moving to or within the Austin area.

OngoingProjects.p1Meta: South Austin · Mixed-Use Development · Est. Completion Q4 2025
OngoingProjects.p1Brief: A landmark mixed-use development redefining South Austin's skyline — 240 luxury residences, ground-floor retail, and world-class amenities.
OngoingProjects.p1Body: A landmark mixed-use development redefining South Austin's skyline. The Lamar Collective combines 240 luxury residences with ground-floor retail and world-class amenities — all within walking distance of Austin's most vibrant cultural corridor.
OngoingProjects.c1Meta: Downtown Austin · Commercial Office · Completed Q2 2023
OngoingProjects.c1Brief: A 22-story Class-A office tower at the heart of Congress Avenue, redefining Austin's downtown skyline with premium workspace and retail.
OngoingProjects.c1Body: Congress Plaza stands as a testament to Nexus's commitment to commercial excellence. This 22-story Class-A office tower delivers 380,000 sq ft of premium workspace across downtown Austin, featuring LEED Platinum certification, panoramic city views, and a curated ground-floor retail experience.
OngoingProjects.c2Brief: An intimate collection of 48 bespoke residences nestled in Barton Hills, blending modern architecture with Austin's natural landscape.
OngoingProjects.c2Body: Barton Heights Residences represent the finest in boutique residential development. Forty-eight bespoke homes are carefully sited within Barton Hills' rolling terrain, each designed to capture sweeping Hill Country views while integrating seamlessly with Austin's beloved natural corridors.
OngoingProjects.c3Brief: Seventy-two industrial-chic lofts rising above Austin's most celebrated entertainment district, steps from the city's finest bars and restaurants.
OngoingProjects.c3Body: Rainey Street Lofts deliver an unparalleled urban lifestyle at the epicenter of Austin's cultural scene. Seventy-two meticulously designed residences feature exposed concrete, soaring ceilings, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the vibrant Rainey Street corridor.
OngoingProjects.c4Brief: A walkable mixed-use community anchoring the Mueller District, with 160 residences, neighborhood retail, and green park frontage.
OngoingProjects.c4Body: Mueller Commons exemplifies Nexus's vision for sustainable, community-centered development. One hundred and sixty residences sit above 40,000 sq ft of neighborhood-serving retail, all oriented around a central park and connected by a network of hike-and-bike trails.
OngoingProjects.p2Meta: East Austin · Mixed-Use Development · Est. Completion Q2 2026
OngoingProjects.p2Brief: A creative mixed-use campus in East Austin anchored by live-work lofts, maker studios, and a curated food hall spanning three city blocks.
OngoingProjects.p2Body: Eastside Yard reimagines three underutilized city blocks in East Austin as a thriving creative campus. The development features 120 live-work lofts, 60,000 sq ft of maker and creative studio space, and a 12,000 sq ft food hall curated by Austin's most celebrated chefs.
OngoingProjects.p3Meta: The Domain · Class-A Office · Est. Completion Q1 2027
OngoingProjects.p3Brief: A 28-story Class-A office tower at The Domain, positioning Nexus at the forefront of Austin's booming tech corridor.
OngoingProjects.p3Body: Domain North Tower will be the defining landmark of Austin's fastest-growing tech corridor. The 28-story tower delivers 520,000 sq ft of LEED Platinum-certified workspace, ground-level retail activation, and a rooftop amenity deck with panoramic views across Austin.

PropertiesPage.sub: Explore our full portfolio of ongoing developments and completed landmark projects across Austin, TX.
PropertiesPage.ctaSub: Our advisors are ready to match you with the right opportunity.

ServicesPage.heading: Full-Spectrum Real Estate Services
ServicesPage.sub: From your first home to a complex commercial portfolio — we have the expertise to guide every step.
ServicesPage.s1Sub: Expert guidance for buying and selling premium homes across Austin's most sought-after neighborhoods.
ServicesPage.s1Desc: Our residential sales team combines deep local market knowledge with white-glove service to help you buy or sell with confidence. Whether you're upsizing, downsizing, or purchasing your first home, we handle every detail from listing to closing.
ServicesPage.s1Req2: Mortgage pre-approval letter (buyers) or property deed (sellers)
ServicesPage.s1Req3: Disclosure of any known property defects
ServicesPage.s2Sub: Strategic insights to maximize your real estate portfolio and identify high-value opportunities.
ServicesPage.s2Desc: Our investment advisory team delivers institutional-grade analysis to individual and corporate investors. We identify undervalued assets, model returns, and structure acquisitions to maximize your long-term wealth.
ServicesPage.s2Req2: Proof of funds or financing capacity
ServicesPage.s2Req3: Risk tolerance and preferred asset classes
ServicesPage.s2Req4: Investment timeline (short-term flip vs. long-term hold)
ServicesPage.s2Step1: Portfolio review and investment goal setting
ServicesPage.s3Sub: Full-service commercial real estate solutions for businesses of every size and ambition.
ServicesPage.s3Desc: From boutique retail to corporate headquarters, our commercial leasing team negotiates lease terms that protect your business interests. We represent both tenants and landlords across office, retail, and industrial spaces.
ServicesPage.s3Req3: Space requirements: sq ft, layout, and term length
ServicesPage.s3Step1: Space needs analysis and market survey
ServicesPage.s4Sub: Seamless transitions for individuals and families moving to or within the Austin area.
ServicesPage.s4Desc: Moving is stressful — we make it effortless. Our relocation specialists coordinate every aspect of your move, from neighborhood orientation and school research to home finding and utility setup.
ServicesPage.s4Req1: Target move-in date and timeline flexibility
ServicesPage.s4Req2: Household size and school-age children (if any)
ServicesPage.s4Req4: Budget range for rent or purchase
ServicesPage.s5Sub: Hands-off ownership with hands-on management — protecting your investment around the clock.
ServicesPage.s5Desc: Our property management team handles everything so you don't have to. From tenant screening and rent collection to maintenance coordination and financial reporting, we keep your asset performing at its best.
ServicesPage.s5Step4: Monthly financial reporting and annual review
ServicesPage.s6Sub: Data-driven insights to help you buy, sell, or invest at exactly the right moment.
ServicesPage.s6Desc: Our in-house market analysts produce comprehensive reports covering pricing trends, absorption rates, comparable sales, and demand forecasting. Make every real estate decision backed by real data.
ServicesPage.s6Req1: Property address or target market area
ServicesPage.s6Req2: Purpose of analysis (buy, sell, or invest)
ServicesPage.s7Sub: Transforming spaces to maximize appeal, value, and lifestyle — before listing or after purchase.
ServicesPage.s7Desc: Our interior consultants work with buyers, sellers, and developers to enhance property value through thoughtful design. From pre-sale staging to full interior specification, we create spaces that command premium prices.
ServicesPage.s7Req2: Budget range for staging or renovation
ServicesPage.s7Req3: Project timeline and listing date (if selling)
ServicesPage.s8Sub: Expert legal support for every real estate transaction — protecting your interests from contract to closing.
ServicesPage.s8Desc: Our affiliated legal team specializes in real estate law, covering purchase agreements, title searches, contract review, dispute resolution, and compliance. We ensure every transaction is airtight.
ServicesPage.s8Req2: Existing contracts or documents for review
ServicesPage.s8Req4: Desired closing date and any known complications
ServicesPage.ctaSub: Our advisors are here to understand your goals and match you with exactly the right service.

Contact.heading: We'd Love to Hear From You
Contact.sub: Whether you're buying, selling, investing, or just exploring — our team is here to guide you every step of the way.
Contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your real estate needs...
Contact.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will be in touch within one business day.

Careers.heading: Build Your Career at Nexus
Careers.sub: We're always looking for talented, driven individuals to join our growing team of real estate professionals.
Careers.why1Body: Industry-leading commission structures, base salaries, and performance bonuses that reward your success.
Careers.why2Body: Access to ongoing training, mentorship programs, and market education to keep you ahead of the curve.
Careers.why3Body: A supportive, inclusive team environment where your ideas are heard and your growth is a shared goal.
Careers.why4Body: Represent one of Austin's most respected real estate brands and open doors that other firms can't.
Careers.role1Desc: Lead residential and commercial transactions, develop client relationships, and mentor junior agents across our Austin portfolio.
Careers.role2Desc: Conduct market research, financial modeling, and due diligence to identify high-value acquisition opportunities for our clients.
Careers.role3Desc: Drive brand awareness and lead generation through digital campaigns, content creation, and property marketing strategies.
Careers.role4Desc: Serve as the primary point of contact for our top-tier clients, ensuring an exceptional experience from first inquiry to closing.
Careers.role5Desc: Oversee day-to-day operations for our managed residential and commercial portfolio, coordinating maintenance and tenant relations.
Careers.role6Desc: An ideal entry point for newly licensed agents. Work alongside senior agents on active listings and client relationships.
Careers.applySub: We're always open to hearing from exceptional talent. Send us your CV and we'll be in touch.
Careers.applyMessagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself and why you'd like to join Nexus...

NotFound.heading: Page Not Found
NotFound.sub: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let us help you find what you need.

PrivacyPolicy.heading: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you inquire about a property, register for events, or contact us for services. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and any other details you share.
PrivacyPolicy.s2Body: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you about properties and opportunities, send you market reports and newsletters you've requested, and comply with legal obligations.
PrivacyPolicy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business, subject to confidentiality agreements. We may also disclose information when required by law.
PrivacyPolicy.s4Body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no internet transmission is completely secure.
PrivacyPolicy.s5Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at hello@nexusproperties.com or visit our office at 1234 Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX 78704.

Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.s1Body: By accessing or using the Nexus Properties website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
Terms.s2Body: Our services are intended for lawful purposes only. You agree not to misuse our platform, reproduce content without permission, or engage in any activity that could harm Nexus Properties or its clients.
Terms.s3Body: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and designs, is the intellectual property of Nexus Properties or its licensors. Unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.
Terms.s4Body: Our services are provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy of property listings, market data, or investment projections presented on our platform.
Terms.s5Body: Nexus Properties shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for services in the preceding twelve months.

CookiePolicy.heading: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.s1Body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.
CookiePolicy.s2Body: We use essential cookies (required for the website to function), analytics cookies (to understand traffic patterns), and preference cookies (to remember your language and display choices). We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
CookiePolicy.s3Body: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some functionality of our website. Most browsers allow you to refuse new cookies and delete existing ones.
CookiePolicy.s4Body: For questions about our cookie practices, contact us at hello@nexusproperties.com.

Disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
Disclaimer.s1Body: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only and does not constitute professional real estate, financial, legal, or investment advice. Always consult qualified professionals before making real estate decisions.
Disclaimer.s2Body: While we strive to keep property listings, pricing, and availability accurate, information is subject to change without notice. Nexus Properties makes no representations or warranties about the completeness or accuracy of any listing.
Disclaimer.s3Body: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. Nexus Properties is not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or reliability of any external sites. Links are provided for convenience only.

Accessibility.heading: Accessibility Statement
Accessibility.s1Body: Nexus Properties is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.
Accessibility.s2Body: We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. Our website is built with semantic HTML, sufficient color contrast, keyboard navigability, and screen reader compatibility.
Accessibility.s3Body: If you experience any accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us at hello@nexusproperties.com. We take all feedback seriously and respond within 2 business days.
